name.description: The name of the configuration set. The name must be 1-64 characters long and can contain only letters, numbers, dashes, and underscores.

validation.error_message: `name` must be 1-64 characters long and can contain only letters, numbers, dashes, and underscores.

reputation_metrics_enabled.description: Enable or disable collection of reputation metrics for the configuration set.

sending_enabled.description: Enable or disable email sending for the configuration set.

delivery_options.description: Configuration block for delivery options for the configuration set.

tracking_options.description: Configuration block for tracking options for the configuration set.
